productDisplayName: Pal Zileri Men Casual Metalic Frame Sunglasses
description: High on style and crafted from superior Italian acetate for a truly exquisite feel, A model of gracious metal and acetate fusion, echoing the pal zileri identity through the subtle revelation of a signature Prince of Wales pattern on the inside. An eclectic mixture of fashion and substance, its shape provides the perfect Fit over the root of your nose. These glasses come with a brand box and a velvet case for safekeeping. Tinted lens for use in normal daylight conditions Thin metal frame in an aerodynamic design Rectangular lens for absolute style and protection from elements Flexible hinges for durability and ease of wear Flexible nose pads made of durable rubber to hold the glasses in place, ensuring there is no friction with the skin Care Remove dust and grime by gently wiping the lens with the cloth provided Remove oil or tough stains with the help of a lens cleaner Do not use your fingers on such stains Do not place glasses on uneven surface or heated areas like the dashboard of a car
